page: Google Cloud Platform n2-highcpu-32 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The memory configuration consists of 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1.0 GB per vCPU ratio. Cache resources include 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 33 MB of L3 cache. This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs.

Benchmark results show average performance across most compute and memory metrics, with specific strengths in large-block memory operations. The instance achieved a stress-ng single-core score of 1409.48 and a multi-core score of 29778.72. Memory bandwidth for large-block read-only operations reached 177.33 GB/sec, and write operations reached 91.03 GB/sec, both placing in the top 25% tier. For language model workloads, text generation using a small 135M model demonstrated strong performance at 284.06 tokens/sec, while prompt processing performed at an average rate of 1608.86 tokens/sec.

With a low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:1, this server is optimized for CPU-bound tasks rather than memory-intensive databases. It offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high parallel processing power without the overhead of excess memory. Supported instruction sets include AVX-512 and AES cryptography, which assist in accelerating vector calculations and secure operations. This configuration is suited for compute-heavy workloads such as software compilation, web serving, and lightweight text or image processing.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2-highcpu-32 is an x86_64 compute-focused server featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.8 GHz across 16 physical cores, it includes 33 MB of L3 cache and supports AVX-512 instruction sets. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. In benchmark testing, it delivers average multi-core performance with a stress-ng score of 29778.72 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 9659.0. Notably, it exhibits strong large-block memory bandwidth, reaching 177.33 GB/sec for read operations and 91.03 GB/sec for write operations. With its 1.0 GB of RAM per vCPU ratio, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for parallel, CPU-bound tasks. It is best suited for workloads such as software compilation, web serving, and lightweight text or image processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2-highcpu-32 is an x86_64 server with 32 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon CPU. It offers strong large-block memory bandwidth and is optimized for compute-heavy workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-vCPU compute-focused instance featuring strong large-block memory bandwidth for parallel processing and CPU-bound workloads.

32.0 GB of RAM providing a compute-optimized 1.0 GB per vCPU ratio
Strong large-block memory bandwidth reaching 177.33 GB/sec read and 91.03 GB/sec write
Supports AVX-512 vector extensions and AES cryptography instructions
Suited for CPU-bound workloads including software compilation and web serving
